name: Mercury
description: Monitor Mercury corporate banking platform for account access and financial data compliance

config.setupInstructions:
1. Log in to Mercury at https://app.mercury.com
2. Go to Settings → API Tokens
3. Create a new token with read access
4. Enter it below

credentialFields.label: API Token
credentialFields.helpText: Found in Mercury Settings → API Tokens

checks.name: Employee Access
checks.description: Reviews Mercury bank account access and team permissions
